name: Apocalypse
author: Despair
description: Apocalypse Mod for Resident Evil Outbreak FILE #1 & FILE #2.

changelog: Outbreak: Revised travelling zombie behaviour throughout the scenario.
Outbreak: Increased the rooftop escape timer for Easy and Normal difficulties.
Outbreak: Set footbridge enemies to respawn.
Outbreak: Increased the Main Street explosion timer.
Outbreak: Minor item economy adjustments.
Outbreak: Adjusted item placement in front of J's Bar.
Outbreak: Removed a duplicate Storage Key instance.
Outbreak: Fixed an incorrect shutter animation.
Outbreak: Fixed a bug causing the Dorian dialogue sequence to freeze the game.
Below Freezing Point: Minor item economy adjustments.
Below Freezing Point: Updated the photo item description text.
The Hive: Revised shutter zombie behaviour in the Central Waiting Room.
The Hive: Adjusted enemy placement in the Waste Liquid Disposal Room.
The Hive: Adjusted item placement in the Waste Liquid Disposal Room.
The Hive: Restored a missing item for Alyssa's drawer in the Office.
Hellfire: Increased enemy count throughout the scenario.
Hellfire: Updated the Ring Bell item description.
Hellfire: Updated the Lounge Stairs and 3F Door description text.
Hellfire: Fixed a spelling error in Amelia's dialogue.
Decisions, Decisions: Reduced the university explosion timer.
Decisions, Decisions: Reduced the nuke timer.
Decisions, Decisions: Increased enemy count throughout the scenario.
Decisions, Decisions: It is no longer possible to complete both B2F and B4F objectives in a single linear run.
Decisions, Decisions: The shed door is now locked and unbreakable.
Decisions, Decisions: Updated the broken knob door description text.
Decisions, Decisions: Fixed a bug causing the V-Poison to revert to a Depleted P-Base upon presentation.
General: Created a custom SLPM file for the fast loading method.
General: Significantly reduced Grenade Launcher BOW rounds damage against doors.

archives.description: ELF executable and core game folders
